description_long: This is a classical-style stone sculpture depicting a standing male figure adorned with a laurel wreath on his head. The figure is dressed in a draped tunic and cloak, with detailed folds in the fabric and a muscular, partially exposed chest. The right arm is bent, with the hand resting on the chest, while the left arm is draped with the cloak and hangs by the side. The sculpture stands on a rectangular plinth, and the surface shows signs of weathering, suggesting it may have been displayed outdoors. The back of the sculpture features the flowing cloak, with less detail on the rear of the figure. The overall appearance is reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary, with a focus on naturalistic anatomy and classical attire.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a standing male figure in classical attire, wearing a laurel wreath and draped cloak. The figure is detailed and lifelike, with a strong, naturalistic pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the male figure's face, laurel wreath, draped cloak, and detailed tunic with the right hand on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped cloak, and the exposed muscular chest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the laurel wreath, and the full length of the flowing cloak with minimal anatomical detail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, the arm draped with the cloak, and the figure's stance on the plinth.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in classical attire with laurel wreath
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
